Portable converter

Render-first extraction should work on unknown Lovable layouts.

This fixture uses generic divs, nested wrappers and visual bands so the pipeline cannot depend on old class names or fixed DOM landmarks.

Launch preview See details

Visual groups

Sections are inferred by geometry, not by matching a single test site.

Real assets

Backgrounds, cards, buttons and links stay visible after browser rendering.

Fallbacks

When structure is unsafe, the converter escalates to geometry and snapshots.

Universal output

No hardcoded text, id or class should be required for content to survive.

Export now
